description: Get started creating an Azure custom role using Azure CLI and Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC) in this tutorial.
summary: If theAzure built-in rolesdon't meet the specific needs of your organization, you can create your own custom roles. For this tutorial, you create a custom role named Reader Support Tickets using Azure CLI. The custom role allows the user to view everything in the control plane of a subscription and also open support tickets. In this tutorial, you learn how to: If you don't have an Azure subscription, create afree accountbefore you begin.
classification_reason: Covers custom role definition schema and CLI parameters for configuring permissions; product-specific configuration details.
